text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of a long and arduous
journey in the Twinkle Series for me and my
trainee. Her name is...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're in the presence of Sweep Tosho—also
known as the genius Magical Girl Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Listen up. Someday, I'm going to become a great
witch just like Grandma!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But for that to happen, I'll need you to work
reeeal hard for me as my familiar! You can start
off by bringing me some sweets!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begin my days challenging the Twinkle
Series with <chrname>!
